UpdateSourceArgs: -c "cd {{$FullRootDir}} && if [ ! -d '.wine/drive_c/Program Files/dotnet' ]; then mkdir -p '.wine/drive_c/Program Files/dotnet'; wget -qO dotnet.zip https://download.visualstudio.microsoft.com/download/pr/8c0f/dotnet-runtime-6.0.25-win-x64.zip || exit 1; unzip -q dotnet.zip -d '.wine/drive_c/Program Files/dotnet'; rm -f dotnet.zip; echo '.NET runtime installed'; else echo '.NET already present'; fi"
